meta.description: Detroit Dynamo is a Detroit-based soccer development pathway for private training, youth club growth, and future senior-team competition.
meta.ogDescription: Detroit Dynamo is a Detroit-based soccer development pathway for private training, youth club growth, and future senior-team competition.
meta.twitterDescription: Detroit Dynamo is a Detroit-based soccer development pathway for private training, youth club growth, and future senior-team competition.

anchors.text: LIVE BOOKING FLOW Use the existing booking process to pick county, coach, package, duration, goals, and checkout. BOOK TRAINING
CLIENT PORTAL Clients can manage sessions, credits, messages, rescheduling, and progress from the dashboard. OPEN DASHBOARD
COACH PORTAL Coaches keep their schedule, sessions, clients, earnings, profile, and messages in the existing portal. OPEN COACH PORTAL
ADMIN PORTAL Admins keep access to coaches, bookings, pricing, users, applications, content, and Dynamo operations. OPEN ADMIN
OAKLAND North Metro Detroit Private and small-group training across Oakland County. BOOK IN OAKLAND
MACOMB East Metro Detroit Technical work, finishing, and development sessions in Macomb County. BOOK IN MACOMB
WAYNE Central Metro Detroit A dedicated training path for players across Wayne County. BOOK IN WAYNE
TRAINING ACADEMY LAUNCH ROADMAP Publish real program announcements, camp releases, and coach updates when approved. OPEN
YOUTH CLUB DEVELOPMENT ROADMAP Use future-pathway language until age groups, staff, facilities, and leagues are confirmed. OPEN
SENIOR TEAM INTEREST WINDOW Route men's and women's player interest into the future registrar/admin workflow. OPEN
FOUNDING SPONSOR CONVERSATIONS Give local partners a clear path into the organization before matchday inventory exists. OPEN
DETROIT DYNAMO Built in Detroit. Driven by development.
